text:
miwi        2012-05-25 13:57:29 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    games                Makefile 
  Added files:
    games/py-fife        Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    games/py-fife/files  patch-SConstruct 
  Log:
  FIFE is a cross platform 2D game creation framework written in C++ with Python
  bindings. It's designed to be flexible enough to support a wide variety of
  2D game types but specializes in 2D isometric type views.
  
  WWW: http://www.fifengine.net/
  
  PR:             ports/168231
  Submitted by:   GreenDog <fiziologus@gmail.com>
